description: Near-miss assets emitted into the simulated DataHub organization. They are deliberately plausible search results, but they must not cluster with MetricGuard's four conflicting metric families.

definitions.name: monthly_revenue_trend
definitions.reason: Monthly revenue is a reporting trend, not a competing weekly-revenue definition.

definitions.name: weekly_new_customer_signups
definitions.reason: Weekly signups share a time grain with other metrics but measure a different entity and source population.

definitions.name: average_order_value
definitions.source: dashboard query: Executive KPIs / Average order value
definitions.reason: Average order value uses the orders source but is an average, not revenue or order volume.

definitions.name: revenue_forecast_inputs
definitions.reason: A raw planning input with a revenue-related name is source data, not a SQL metric definition.
